  <script id="wix-skip-played-animations-setup">
    (function() {
        var navEntry = performance.getEntriesByType('navigation')[0];
        if (navEntry && navEntry.type === 'reload') {
            return;
        }
        if ('PageRevealEvent' in window) {
            window.__pageRevealPromise = new Promise(function(resolve) {
                window.addEventListener('pagereveal', resolve, { once: true });
            });
        } else {
            window.__pageRevealPromise = Promise.resolve();
        }
    })();
  </script>

#comp-khx8wrad .style-khya9u0u__root{-st-extends: StylableButton;transition: all 0.2s ease, visibility 0s;border-radius: 50px;background: repeat padding-box border-box 0% 0%/auto auto scroll linear-gradient(145deg, #2B65B5 29%, #35a569 100%), #EBF0D4}

/* START STYLABLE DIRECTIVE RULES */

#comp-khx8wrad .style-khya9u0u__root:hover{
    background: repeat padding-box border-box 0% 0%/auto auto scroll linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(43, 101, 181, 0.66) 0%, rgba(47, 128, 149, 0.66) 42%, rgba(53, 165, 105, 0.65) 100%), #FFEEEE}

#comp-khx8wrad .style-khya9u0u__root[disabled]{background: #E2E2E2}

#comp-khx8wrad .style-khya9u0u__root[disabled] .StylableButton2545352419__label{color: #8F8F8F}

#comp-khx8wrad .style-khya9u0u__root[disabled] .StylableButton2545352419__icon{fill: #8F8F8F}

#comp-khx8wrad .style-khya9u0u__root .StylableButton2545352419__container{transition: inherit;flex-direction: row-reverse}

#comp-khx8wrad .style-khya9u0u__root .StylableButton2545352419__label{transition: inherit;letter-spacing: 0.1em;font-family: tsukushimarugothic,meiryo,"ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3","hiragino kaku gothic pro",sans-serif;font-size: 15px;color: #F8F8F8;margin: 0px 0px 0px 4.5px}

#comp-khx8wrad .style-khya9u0u__root .StylableButton2545352419__icon{transition: inherit;fill: #F8F8F8;width: 20px;height: 20px;margin: 0px 4.5px 0px 0px}

@media screen and (min-width: 1px) and (max-width: 0px) {
    #comp-khx8wrad .style-khya9u0u__root .StylableButton2545352419__icon {
        width: 15px;
        height: 15px;
    }
    #comp-khx8wrad .style-khya9u0u__root .StylableButton2545352419__label {
        font-size: 10px;
    }
}#comp-khx8wrad{width:142px;height:40px;}#comp-khx7levl{width:56px;height:39px;}#comp-khx7levl{--fill-opacity:1;--fill:#242323;--stroke-width:0;--stroke:#5E97FF;--stroke-opacity:1;}#comp-khx92x7s{width:270px;height:auto;}#comp-khx92x7s{--min-height:25px;--text-direction:var(--wix-opt-in-direction);}</style>

<script id="wix-first-paint">
    if (window.ResizeObserver &&
        (!window.PerformanceObserver || !PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes || PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes.indexOf('paint') === -1)) {
        new ResizeObserver(function (entries, observer) {
            entries.some(function (entry) {
                var contentRect = entry.contentRect;
                if (contentRect.width > 0 && contentRect.height > 0) {
                    requestAnimationFrame(function (now) {
                        window.wixFirstPaint = now;
                        dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('wixFirstPaint'));
                    });
                    observer.disconnect();
                    return true;
                }
            });
        }).observe(document.body);
    }
</script>


<script id="scroll-bar-width-calculation">
    const div = document.createElement('div')
    div.style.overflowY = 'scroll'
    div.style.width = '50px'
    div.style.height = '50px'
    div.style.visibility = 'hidden'
    document.body.appendChild(div)
    const scrollbarWidth= div.offsetWidth - div.clientWidth
    document.body.removeChild(div)
    if(scrollbarWidth > 0){
        document.body.style.setProperty('--scrollbar-width', `${scrollbarWidth}px`)
    }
</script>

pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">February 26, 2026</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><a href="https://www.spsj.or.jp/nus_im/webapp/data_file/260225053257_8.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">​村岡が、高分子学会学術賞を受賞しました。多大なご支援を頂いた共同研究者のみなさま、本賞に選出頂いた審査員のみなさまに心より御礼申し上げます。</span></span></span></a></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixGuard wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">February 19, 2026</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.nikkan.co.jp/articles/view/00774224" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-style:italic;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">​JACS Au</span>へ発表した研究成果が、日刊工業新聞に掲載されました。</span></span></span></a></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">February 9, 2026</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><a href="https://pubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/jacsau.5c01572" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">​岩本さん、荒井先生（東海大学）らの論文が、<span style="font-style:italic;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">JACS Au</span> (American Chemical Society)にアクセプトされました。</span></span></span></a></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">ACS Editors&#39; Choiceにてハイライトされました。<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.tuat.ac.jp/outline/disclosure/pressrelease/2025/20260209_01.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">プレスリリース</a></span>。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">January 26, 2026</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​「自己組織化ペプチド」の発明が、特許第7805589号として登録されました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">January 16, 2026</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​矢口くんが、RIKEN CEMS Rising Star Awardを受賞しました。おめでとうございます！</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">December 26, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​鈴木くんが、令和7年度 東京農工大学学業等成績優秀者に選ばれました。おめでとうございます！</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">December 23, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​森さんが、第42回井上研究奨励賞（井上科学振興財団）を受賞しました。おめでとうございます！</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">December 16&ndash;17, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​村岡が、Pacifichem 2025で招待講演を2件行いました（Session 1: &quot;Protein Aggregation, Biocondensation, and Biomolecular Self-Assembly&quot;, Session 2: &quot;Polypeptide Folding and Assembly for the Materials Design and Therapeutic Applications&quot;）。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">また、シンポジウム&quot;</span></span></span><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">Polypeptide Folding and Assembly for the Materials Design and Therapeutic Applications&quot;をCorresponding Symposium Organizerとして実施しました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">December 16, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">内田さん、小島さん、喜多村さん、鈴木くん、福島さん、井上さんが、Pacifichem 2025（米国ハワイ）で口頭発表しました。</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">December 1, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">村岡が、米国のFlorida State University、Clemson Universityで招待講演しました。</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">November 13, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">村岡が<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://spsj.or.jp/branch/tohoku/event/25ev04.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">2025年度高分子コロキウム</a></span>（日本化学会東北支部主催、仙台）で招待講演しました。</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">November 11, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">奥村先生（東北大）、李先生（韓国KBSI）、齋尾先生（徳島大）が中心となって取り組んだ研究成果が、<span style="font-style:italic;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.nature.com/articles/s41556-025-01794-8" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Nature Cell Biology</a></span></span>誌 (Springer Nature)に発表されました。ともに取り組んだ学術変革領域研究(B)「遅延制御超分子化学」の研究成果でもあります（<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.tuat.ac.jp/outline/disclosure/pressrelease/2025/20251111_01.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">プレスリリース</a></span>）。</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">November 4, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">Department of Molecular Medicine, University of Padua（イタリア）で村岡が招待講演、鈴木くんが口頭発表しました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">October 24, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">3年生4名がラボメンバーに加わりました！</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">October 24, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://pubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/jacs.5c13384" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-style:italic;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">J. Am. Chem. Soc.</span>誌に発表した内田さんの論文</span></span></span></a>が公開され、<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.tuat.ac.jp/outline/disclosure/pressrelease/2025/20251024_02.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">農工大</a></span>と<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.jst.go.jp/pr/announce/20251024-3/index.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">JST</a></span>からプレスリリースされました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">October 22, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">勝間田くん、佐野さんが、第15回CSJ化学フェスタ2025（東京）でポスター発表しました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">October 21, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">鈴木くんが、第62回ペプチド討論会（福岡）でポスター発表しました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">September 30, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">鈴木くんが、日本学術振興会特別研究員DC2に内定しました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">September 30, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">内田さん、石坂くん、河北さん、村西さん、岩崎さん、吉澤くんが中心となって取り組んだ研究成果が、<span style="font-style:italic;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">J. Am. Chem. Soc.</span> (American Chemical Society)にアクセプトされました。上野先生・野地先生（東大）、笠井先生（国立がん研）、渡辺先生（北里大）、横山先生、奥村先生、金村先生（東北大）、味岡先生（科学大）との共同研究成果です。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">September 23, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">内田 特任講師の研究課題が、<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.jst.go.jp/souhatsu/research/all_researcher.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">JST創発的研究支援事業</a></span>に採択されました。さらなる活躍に期待しています！</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">September 19, 2025</span></p>

Chem.</span>誌に発表した森さんの論文が<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1002/anie.202502187" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">オープンアクセスで公開</a></span>され、プレスリリースされました（<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.tuat.ac.jp/outline/disclosure/pressrelease/2025/20250703_01.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">農工大</a></span>、<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.jst.go.jp/pr/announce/20250703-4/index.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">JST</a></span>）。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">June 20, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">鈴木くんが第25回日本蛋白質科学会年会でポスター賞を受賞しました。おめでとうございます！（<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.tuat.ac.jp/NEWS/activity/20250701_03.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">大学サイト</a></span><a href="https://www.tuat.ac.jp/NEWS/activity/20250701_03.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">、</a><span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.pssj.jp/newsletters/25/3.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">学会HP</a></span><a href="https://www.pssj.jp/newsletters/25/3.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">）</a></span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span>​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">June 18, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">第25回日本蛋白質科学会年会（姫路）で村岡が招待講演、鈴木くんと佐野さんがポスター発表しました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">June 6, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">森さんの論文が<span style="font-style:italic;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Angewandte Chemie</span> (Wiley)にアクセプトされました。おめでとうございます！</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">May 30, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">喜多村さんが、ISMSC 2025でポスター賞を受賞しました。おめでとうございます！（<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.tuat.ac.jp/NEWS/activity/20250620_01.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">大学サイト</a></span>）</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">May 25, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">喜多村さんと鈴木君がISMSC 2025 (京都)でポスター発表しました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">April 7, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">昨年<span style="font-style:italic;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Chemical Science</span> (Royal Society of Chemistry)に発表した総説 &quot;<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1039/D3SC05781J" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Enzymatic and synthetic regulation of polypeptide folding</a></span>&quot; が、<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://pubs.rsc.org/en/journals/articlecollectionlanding?sercode=sc&themeid=cb75f996-6cd9-477e-b0f9-3b494b7e1ecc" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">2024 most popular chemical biology articles collection</a></span> に選ばれました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">April 1, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">小島さんが、特任助教(JSPS-PD)としてラボに加わりました！</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">March 26, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">森君、喜多村さん、秋元君、森井君、勝間田君が日本化学会春期年会で、鈴木君、福島さん、吉田さんが日本薬学会年会で発表しました！</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">March 14, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">村岡が、市村学術賞（市村清新技術財団）を受賞しました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">March 7, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">喜多村さんが、令和6年度 東京農工大学学生表彰に選出されました。学生表彰は、学術研究活動において特に顕著な業績を挙げ、学界又は社会的に高い評価を受けた学生を表彰するものです。おめでとうございます！</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">March 5, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">勝間田くんが、応用化学科 最優秀卒業論文発表賞を受賞しました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">石坂くん、山下さんが、応用化学専攻 優秀修士論文発表賞を受賞しました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">おめでとうございます！</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">February 17, 2025</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">村岡がInternational Seminar on Bioengineering 2025 (岡山大学) にて招待講演しました。オーガナイザーのハラ先生、大変お世話になりました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">December 24, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">森くんのインタビュー記事が<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.chem-station.com/blog/2024/12/2024-cas-future-leaders-program.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Chem-Station</a></span>に掲載されています。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">December 24, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">村岡、内田さん、笠くんで出願した発明が、特許第7602252号として登録されました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">December 19, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">森くんのインタビュー記事が<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.jaici.or.jp/solutions/interview/cas-future-leaders/cfl-case14/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">JAICIのホームページ</a></span>に掲載されています。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">December 5, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">村岡が<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://nationalmaglab.org/news-events/events/for-scientists/symposium-on-pathomechanisms-of-amyloid-diseases/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">6th International Symposium on Pathomechanisms of Amyloid Diseases</a></span>で招待講演しました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">December 2, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://festa.csj.jp/2024/document/award.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">​喜多村さん、山下さんが、第14回CSJ化学フェスタ2024：最優秀ポスター発表賞 (CSJ化学フェスタ賞) を受</a></span>賞しました！<br class="wixui-rich-text__text">
ダブル受賞、おめでとうございます！</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">October 26, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​村岡が<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://spsj.or.jp/kenkyukai/kantowakate/event/2024aki.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">関東高分子若手研究会 2024 秋の講演会</a></span>で招待講演を行いました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">世話人の正井先生（東大）、大変お世話になりました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">October 22, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​喜多村さん、山下さん、近藤さん、石坂くん、鈴木くん、佐野さんが、CSJ化学フェスタでポスター発表を行いました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">October 21, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​3年生が配属されました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">September 13, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​内田さん、喜多村さん、鈴木君が第18回バイオ関連化学シンポジウムで発表しました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">August 13, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​「自己組織化ペプチドを含む組成物」の発明が、特許第7537678号として登録されました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">August 1, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​<span style="font-style:italic;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Chemical Science</span>に発表した研究成果が、<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://bio.nikkeibp.co.jp/atcl/news/p1/24/07/31/12203/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">日経バイオテク</a></span>で紹介されました。</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​「東京農工大・徳島大・東北大、蛋白質の正しいフォールディングを助ける化合物を開発」</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">July 29, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​鈴木くんの論文が<span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1039/D4SC02123A" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-style:italic;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Chemical Science</span></a></span> (Royal Society of Chemistry)</span>にアクセプトされ、プレスリリース (<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.tuat.ac.jp/outline/disclosure/pressrelease/2024/20240729_01.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">農工大</a></span>, <span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.jst.go.jp/pr/announce/20240729/index.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">JST</a></span>) されました。東北大学 奥村先生・馬渕先生・金村先生、徳島大学 齋尾先生・松崎先生らとの共同研究成果です。</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">July 11, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-style:italic;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Biomacromolecules</span></span><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">に発表した研究成果が、<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://sj.jst.go.jp/news/202407/n0711-01k.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Science Japan</a></span>に掲載されました。</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">July 6, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​村岡が<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://x.com/GoWatanabe_KU/status/1810474960223449119" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">「未来物質開拓シンポジウム（北里大学 未来工学部）」</a></span>で招待講演しました。オーガナイザーの渡辺先生、大変お世話になりました。</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">July 5, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​矢口くんが、第73回高分子学会年次大会（仙台）でポスター賞を受賞しました。おめでとうございます！</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">（<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.tuat.ac.jp/NEWS/activity/20240711_01.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">農工大広報</a></span>）</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></p>
