<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">June 24, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-style:italic;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Biomacromolecules</span>に発表した研究成果が、<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.keguanjp.com/kgjp_keji/kgjp_kj_smkx/pt20240624000001.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">JSTアジア・太平洋総合研究センター​が日本の科学研究を発信する中国語サイト「客観日本」</a></span>で紹介されました。</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-style:italic;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">June 21, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-style:italic;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Biomacromolecules</span></span><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">に発表した研究成果が、科学新聞に掲載されました。</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">「酸化ストレスに応答 細胞や組織を損傷から保護 自己集合性ペプチド開発　東京農工大」</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">June 17, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">OISTで開催された<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://sites.google.com/view/mollife3/home" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">JST創発 第3回分子生命反応創発討論会</a></span>で村岡がポスター発表しました。</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">June 11-13, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://aeplan.jp/pssj2024/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">第24回日本蛋白質科学会年会</span></span><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">（札幌）</span></span></a>で、森さん、喜多村さん、山下さんがポスター発表しました。</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">村岡が、同年会で開催されたワークショップ「相分離遅延を可視化する先端技術」で招待講演しました。</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">June 5, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://main.spsj.or.jp/nenkai/73nenkai/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">第73回高分子学会年次大会（仙台）</a></span>で、内田さん、吉澤くんが口頭発表、矢口くん、鈴木くん、清水さんがポスター発表しました。</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">June 4, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">東北大学 倉持さん、奥村先生との共同研究成果が<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://pubs.rsc.org/en/content/articlelanding/2024/cc/d4cc01712a" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-style:italic;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Chemical Communications</span></a></span> (Royal Society of Chemistry)に掲載されました。（プレスリリース：<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.tuat.ac.jp/outline/disclosure/pressrelease/2024/20240603_01.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">東京農工大学</a></span>、<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.jst.go.jp/pr/announce/20240604/index.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">JST</a></span>）</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">June 4, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">東京農工大学モリ先生との細菌膜透過剤に関する共同発明が、特許第7480447号として登録されました。</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">June 1, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://21hostguest.wixsite.com/my-site" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">第21回ホスト-ゲスト・超分子化学シンポジウム（京都）</a></span>で、森さん、鈴木くんがポスター発表しました。</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">May 17, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-style:italic;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Biomacromolecules</span>に発表した研究成果が、日刊工業新聞に掲載されました。<br class="wixui-rich-text__text">
​「<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.nikkan.co.jp/articles/view/00711523" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">東京農工大、酸化損傷から細胞・組織を保護するペプチド開発</a></span>」</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">May 11, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">森さんが、<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.ismsc2024.com/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">The 18th International Symposium on Macrocyclic and Supramolecular Chemistry</a></span>でBest Poster Awardを受賞しました。</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">おめでとうございます！</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">​（<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.tuat.ac.jp/NEWS/winning/20240520_01.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">農工大広報</a></span>）</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">May 1, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">原さん、吉澤くん、矢口くん、内田さんの論文が<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://pubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/acs.biomac.4c00129" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-style:italic;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Biomacromolecules</span></a></span> (American Chemical Society)にアクセプトされました。<span class="wixui-rich-text__text">國立陽明交通大学（台湾）平松先生との共同研究成果です。（<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.tuat.ac.jp/outline/disclosure/pressrelease/2024/20240514_01.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">プレスリリース</a></span>）</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">April 24, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">日本化学会</span></span></span><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">第104春季年会</span><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">にて<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://pub.confit.atlas.jp/ja/event/csj104th/session/3A1421-0900" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">「遅延制御超分子化学」成果報告会　〜遅延から創る生命機能と高次構造〜</a></span>を開催しました。</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">清水さんが、応用化学科 優秀卒業論文発表賞を受賞しました。おめでとうございます！</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">February 5, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">森くんの博士論文がSpringer Theses Awardに選ばれ、<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://link.springer.com/book/10.1007/978-981-99-9400-7" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Springer Theses</a></span>として公開されました！</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">January 26, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">総説を<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1039/D3SC05781J" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-style:italic;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Chemical Science</span></a></span> (Royal Society of Chemistry, オープンアクセス)に発表しました。タンパク質フォールディングを促進するシャペロンや酸化還元酵素の作用機序についての最新の知見と合成シャペロン開発の最新の展開をまとめました。学術変革領域研究「遅延制御超分子化学」の成果として、奥村先生（東北大）、齋尾先生（徳島大）と共同で執筆しました。（<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.tuat.ac.jp/outline/disclosure/pressrelease/2023/20240129_02.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">プレスリリース</a></span>）</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">January 22, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">本田さん、大栗先生（東大）の論文が<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/anie.202318548" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-style:italic;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Angew. Chem. Int. Ed.</span></a></span>&nbsp;(Wiley, オープンアクセス)に発表されました。</span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​（<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.tuat.ac.jp/outline/disclosure/pressrelease/2023/20240122_02.html" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">プレスリリース</a></span>）</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="line-height:normal; font-size:14px;"><span style="color:rgb(53, 165, 105); font-family:rodin-light,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:bold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">January 20, 2024</span></p>

<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; line-height:normal;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">『<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="http://hokuryukan-ns.co.jp/cms/books/月刊「細胞」2024年2月号-lc（low-complexity）ドメインの生物学/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">月刊「細胞」2024年2月号 LC（Low-Complexity）ドメインの生物学</a></span>』へ寄稿した記事が公開されました。味岡先生（東京医科歯科大）との共同執筆です。</span></span></span><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="color:rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family:rodin-demi-bold,ms gothic,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,osaka,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-kyn407pt" class="comp-kyn407pt aVng1S wixui-horizontal-line"></div><!--/$--></div></div></div><!--/$--></div></section><!--/$--></div></div></section><!--/$--></div></div></div><!--/$--></div></div></div></div></main><footer id="SITE_FOOTER" class="xU8fqS SITE_FOOTER wixui-footer" tabindex="-1"><div class="_C0cVf"><div class="_4XcTfy" data-testid="screenWidthContainerBg"></div></div><div class="U4Bvut"><div class="G5K6X8"><div class="gUbusX" data-testid="screenWidthContainerBgCenter"></div></div><div class="CJF7A2"><div data-mesh-id="SITE_FOOTERinlineContent" data-testid="inline-content" class=""><div data-mesh-id="SITE_FOOTERinlineContent-gridContainer" data-testid="mesh-container-content"><!--$--><div id="comp-khzx9gf8" class="MMl86N zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-khzx9gf8 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_9 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:12px;"><span style="color:#FFFFFF;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-family:メイリオ,meiryo,ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3,hiragino kaku gothic pro,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:12px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Copyright &copy;東京農工大学 <span style="font-style:normal;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-weight:400;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">​大学院 工学研究院 応用化学専攻</span></span><span style="font-style:normal;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-weight:400;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">グローバルイノベーション研究院 村岡研究室</span></span>&nbsp;All rights reserved.&nbsp;</span></span></span></p></div><!--/$--></div></div></div></div></footer></div></div><div id="SCROLL_TO_BOTTOM" class="Vd6aQZ ignore-focus SCROLL_TO_BOTTOM" role="region" tabindex="-1" aria-label="bottom of page"><span class="mHZSwn">bottom of page</span></div></div></div>


<script id="wix-skip-played-animations">
    window.__pageRevealPromise && window.__pageRevealPromise.then(function() {
        requestAnimationFrame(function() {
            try {
                var stored = sessionStorage.getItem('wix-motion-played-animations');
                if (stored) {
                    var played = JSON.parse(stored);
                    for (var compId in played) {
                        if (played[compId]) {
                            var el = document.getElementById(compId);
                            if (el) {
                                el.dataset.motionEnter = 'done';
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            } catch (e) {}
        });
    });
</script>

</script>

			const wixAdsOffsetHeight = document.querySelector(':is(.WIX_ADS, #WIX_ADS)')?.offsetHeight || 0;
			const header = document.getElementsByTagName('header')[0];

			let headerOffsetHeight = 0;

			if (header) {
				const headerPosition = window.getComputedStyle(header).getPropertyValue('position').toLowerCase();
				const isHeaderStickyOrFixed = headerPosition === 'sticky' || headerPosition === 'fixed';
				headerOffsetHeight = isHeaderStickyOrFixed ? header.offsetHeight : 0;
			}

			document.documentElement.style.scrollPaddingTop = `${wixAdsOffsetHeight + headerOffsetHeight}px`;
        </script>
